title: Function of Department
contentHtml:
Elect Power Supply:

 

  • MCF has taken 132 KV supply and 33 KV supply from UPPTCL.

  • Peak load of the factory is approx. 6 MW .

  • MCF also has 4x1000 KVA DG set, as 2nd standby to cater load with some load shedding as per requirement.

Elect Project:

  • Caters various electrical projects in the township and factory area. Such as extension of shops, construction of quarters.

Elect HQ:

  • Caters various administrative activities in the electrical department.

 

Energy Efficient Works

  • ISO 50001:2018 Certification

  • Provision of 100% LED Light

  • Provision of Day Pipe Light

  • Energy Efficient VRF type Air Conditioning
